title: Welcome to Golden Land Restaurant
message: Your customer account is ready. Explore restaurants, browse categories, and track your next order from one protected workspace.

title: Promo discount unlocked
message: You crossed the THB 300 threshold, so your next eligible checkout receives the automatic THB 30 promo benefit.

title: Daily control center ready
message: Your admin workspace is seeded with live dashboard, catalog, and order control data for today's operations review.

title: Catalog review queue updated
message: Product and category changes from the admin CRUD modules now flow directly into the customer browsing experience.
